Who REALLY defined Serie A's golden age? Not a simple answer, is it?

Alessandro Del Piero: The ultimate winner. 1 UCL, 6 Scudetti. Clutch goals, elegant mastery for Juve. He built a dynasty.

Francesco Totti: The eternal king. 1 Scudetto, but carried Roma on his back for 25 years. Raw genius, pure loyalty. He was the dynasty.

One had more silverware, the other more soul. Pick your poison! #SerieA #FootballLegends
